Welcome to Andias

Embark on a Flavorful Journey: Discover the Delight of Savoring Freshness, Where Every Spoonful Brings a Burst of Joy and a Smile to Your Day.

Order online
Meet Our Host
Scott O’Neal
Follow Scott
  • Instagram
  • Twitter
  • Facebook

Immersed in the heart of Florida lies a universe of flavors, colors, and joy that defies the ordinary. A place where every spoonful is an adventure, every smile is contagious, and the music never stops playing. Welcome to Andias Frozen Yogurt, the home of the most exceptional frozen yogurts and unforgettable experiences.

We do more than sell frozen yogurt; we create moments of joy. Every corner of our store resonates with laughter, good music, and positive vibes, thanks to our team, the pulsating heart of our brand, who lives to spread happiness. At Andias , every visit is a celebration for the palate and the soul.

2794 W 68th St Hialeah
FL 33016

hialeah garden

Experience a welcoming family atmosphere, personalized service, and an exceptional overall experience. Enjoy a warm and friendly environment as we cater to your needs and provide top-notch service.

google maps
1000, N Broadwalk Hollywood
FL 33019

hollywood beach

Indulge in breathtaking beachfront views at the prime location of Hollywood Beach. Take a leisurely stroll and refresh yourself with our wide array of products amidst the best location for beachfront enjoyment

google maps
7508 SW 117th Ave, Miami, FL 33183

kendall

Visit us in Kendall! Enjoy a modern spot with over **100 toppings** and **14 unique flavors** of frozen yogurt. Create your perfect combination and indulge in a delicious experience!

google maps
About Us

Best Frozen Yogurt & acai; in Florida

Our stores stand out with over 100 toppings and açaí options, opening up a world of possibilities to customize your flavor experience, whether with frozen yogurt or açaí.

We boast the most original and fun flavors, mixed with tropical fruits and unique ingredients sourced from Asia and Europe. Our selection is a testament to our commitment to bringing you an unparalleled taste experience, blending the exotic with the familiar in surprising and delightful ways. Discover a world of flavor where each scoop is an adventure, inviting you to explore the rich tapestry of tastes that only Andia’s Frozen Yogurt can offer.

Read More
50% Off

6 months validity

Give the gift of great frozen, smoothies & acai!

Surprise your loved ones with treats that transcend the ordinary. Our natural and varied options invite the discovery of unique combinations, turning every choice into a memorable and flavorful gift..

Gift Your Friend
Menu

Food & Drinks

Our menu, crafted by a renowned chef and enriched by expert baristas, embodies creativity, originality, and passion. It promises a unique culinary and coffee experience, with every sip and bite designed to delight and surprise your senses.

In addition to our renowned frozen yogurt, smoothies, and açaí, we also offer a wide array of dining options. Our menu includes a variety of meals such as sandwiches, wraps, coffee, breakfast items, lattes, and more. Each option is crafted with the same commitment to quality and flavor that you’ve come to expect from us, ensuring that there’s something delightful for every time of day.

Order Now
Reviews

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★ 4.5/5
Amazing spot for ice cream and Açaí lovers! The coffee's great too. A cozy place to enjoy healthy meals in a friendly and beautiful atmosphere near the sea. Worth a visit!
FIORELLA GONZALES
★★★★★ 5/5
Mi lugar favorito de frozen yogurt!! Tienen una gran variedad de sabores y toppings, la atención es excelente y la vista al mar es preciosa, 100% lo recomiendo!
DANIELA FONDIN
4.9
Out of 5
★★★★★ 4.5/5
  • 2,394 Ratings
  • 989 Ratings
  • 2574 Ratings
  • 1293 Ratings
★★★★★ 5/5
Ladies are always nice. Its a DIY and they charge by the oz. If you're a member you get free 10 Oz coupons when your points add up. The Rocher Ferrero icecream is the best! With Nutella sauce for the toppings . Lots of variety. Delicious must go!
JESSICA MORRISSON
★★★★★ 4.7/5
Recomendado 1000% El Mejor Frozen Yogurt que he Probado en Miami 😍 con los mejores Sabores y toppings 😋 Un lugar para compartir momentos especiales, excelente atención, buen Servicio y calidad 😎 Me encantan 🥰 Vengan y disfruten de esta delicia 😋
Sayli Casanova

visit us today!

Enjoy unique experiences in each one! From a stunning ocean view to a family-friendly atmosphere and personalized service, we guarantee unforgettable moments with every visit. We look forward to providing you with the best in every corner of our stores!

#andiasfrozenyogurt

Take Selfie & Get 20% OFF flat

Take a selfie enjoying our frozen yogurt, share it on social media with our hashtag, and show it to us to get a 20% discount on your purchase.
